Package proceduretest

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AStarPlugin
    Procedure Class AStarPlugin.
    AStarPlugin.ResultPath
    Class ResultPath defines the type of the record which will be returned by the procedure through a Java 8 stream.
    ExpanderRestriction
    The Class ExpanderRestriction transforms the String representation of one of the restrictions given in the procedure CALL into an restriction object which is used to ensure that this restriction is fulfilled by all Nodes or Relationships which are traversed by aStar.
    Query
    The Class Query is used to store the information concerning the aStar.
    RestrictedPathExpander
    The Class RestrictedPathExpander implements the Interface PathExpander and is used to filter the relationships which are used by AStar during traversal so that only relationships which have the right type and fulfill the given restrictions are used by AStar.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    CoordinateType
    Enumeration CoordinateType contains the permitted coordinate types.
